name: 06-23-split-subagent
title: 拆分 subagent.rs — 抽 sink.rs
description: agent/subagent.rs 3402 行 4 个关注点。拆出: (1) sink.rs (SubagentBufferSink 737 行 + TEST_COLLECTOR thread-local), (2) transcript.rs (TranscriptEntry + TranscriptKind + IPC payload builders), (3) truncate_summary.rs (truncate/format/summarize helpers)。subagent.rs 只留 dispatch + registry + prompt + allowlist + Status enum。
creator: Carlos-home
